checkins.description: That’s a real Westie!!  I’ll honestly have to read this book sometime.  Another winner IPA IMHO! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Lucy In the Vortex With Diamonds by  Georgetown Brewing Company at The Red Hot
checkins.description:
Nice quality collab,  I am down.  Was grateful to try this one before it all
disappears. 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Personal Record by  Athletic Brewing Company at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: This one is crushable!  I like the tumric on the backside!  Perfect for when you have things to do!! 💯🍺🤙
